title: Create controlled SA-backed mutation workload for approved repo file updates
description: Create or extend one SA-backed execution workload that can perform controlled repo mutation only for governance/current_task.json and ssot/MASTER_PROMPT_v162_CANON_FINAL.txt, with mandatory guardrails, commit/push path, and repo-visible proof. This corrective step enables the mutation path only and must not execute TASK-P2-0006 itself.
allowed_strategy: or add one dedicated controlled mutation workflow under .github/workflows/
guardrails: Mutation is allowed only for governance/current_task.json and ssot/MASTER_PROMPT_v162_CANON_FINAL.txt.
Any mutation attempt outside allowlist must hard fail.
Task status must be APPROVED before mutation execution.
Mutation scope must be constrained to declared target files only.
If SSOT mutation is supported, target section must exist before mutation.
Workflow must not perform arbitrary free-form repo mutation.
Workflow must not take audit decisions.
Workflow must not execute TASK-P2-0006 within TASK-P2-0007.

success_conditions: A repo-visible workflow file exists in main with controlled mutation logic.
The workflow contains allowlist limited to governance/current_task.json and ssot/MASTER_PROMPT_v162_CANON_FINAL.txt.
The workflow contains mandatory guardrails before mutation.
The workflow contains commit/push execution path.
The workflow contains SA-backed execution contour.

out_of_scope: actual update of section 3 CURRENT SYSTEM SNAPSHOT
expanding mutation scope beyond the two allowed files
proof_target_summary: A repo-visible workflow file exists in main with SA-backed controlled mutation logic, strict allowlist limited to governance/current_task.json and ssot/MASTER_PROMPT_v162_CANON_FINAL.txt, mandatory guardrails, and commit/push execution path.
